rulings.Case Title: ANDREW M. KING VS. FREMONT INVESTMENT & LOAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 8, 2011, line 3, DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., LITTON LOAN SERVICING LP DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants¿ Demurrer to the 1st cause of action (Declaratory relief) is sustained with leave to amend. Because the cause of action for misrepresentation fails (see below), this cause of action fails as well. Defendants¿ Demurrer to the 2nd cause of action (Violation of CC §2923.52) is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff concedes that there is no private right of action. Defendants¿ Demurrer to the 3rd cause of action (Fraud and Misrepresentation) is sustained with leave to amend. As pled, this cause of action is entirely conclusory and relies on the vague allegations set out in the factual Background¿ section of the FAC. Plaintiff has not stated with any factual specificity the elements for fraud as to the particular defendants. Defendants¿ demurrer to the 4th cause of action (breach of Implied Covenant of Good Faith and Fair Dealing) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff has not pled all of the requisite elements including that there was a contract between the plaintiff and these defendants. Furthermore, the only alleged bases for this claim are actions that took place at or before the time the contract was entered. Plaintiff must plead facts showing these defendants unfairly interfered with Plaintiff¿s right to receive the benefit of the contract after the contract was entered. Defendants¿ demurrer to the 5th cause of action (Violation of CC §§ 1981.5 ¿ 1921) is sustained with leave to amend. This cause of action arises solely out of allegation regarding the loan origination. These defendants are not alleged to have had any involvement in the origination. Plaintiff must plead facts showing a violation by these defendants. Defendants¿ demurrer to the 7th cause of action (Breach of Fiduciary Duty) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to state facts showin
